title: Cybernetics
author: Norbert Wiener
content: “Information is information, not matter or energy.”

title: Introduction to Systems Thinking
author: Donella Meadows
content: “The least obvious part of the system, its function or purpose, is often the most crucial determinant of the system’s behavior.”
action: Identify hidden objectives to predict true output.

title: General System Theory
author: Ludwig von Bertalanffy
content: “The organism is not a machine, but a system of parts in dynamic interaction.”
action: Analyze parts through their interactions, not in isolation.

title: The Fifth Discipline
author: Peter Senge
content: “Systems thinking is a discipline for seeing wholes. It is a framework for seeing interrelationships rather than things.”

title: Introduction to Cybernetics
author: W. Ross Ashby
action: Match threat complexity with internal versatility.
